Title: PolicyLimit_Field_Present_In_Information_Tab
Description: Verify `Policy Limit` is present and identifiable on the Information tab in EzDocs
Steps:
1. Login to ez docs application
2. Select required LOB
3. Select required product
4. Navigate to the Information tab
5. Inspect the screen for `Policy Limit` field
Expected Results: `Policy Limit` field is present on the Information tab and clearly identifiable in the UI.

Title: PolicyLimit_Mapped_To_Payload_Correctly
Description: Verify `Policy Limit` value is mapped and sent correctly in payload
Steps:
1. Login to ez docs application
2. Select required LOB and product
3. Navigate to Information tab
4. Enter `Policy Limit` = 50,000,000
5. Save and generate a payload
6. Capture the outbound payload for the property flow
Expected Results: Payload contains `LimitOfLiability` with value 50,000,000 and the value matches `Policy Limit` entered in the Information tab.

Title: PropertyLimit_Consistency_With_Property_Implementation
Description: Verify property payload implementation is consistent with existing property flows
Steps:
1. Login and select a property LOB under Automated Coding
2. Enter `Policy Limit` and coverage values
3. Generate the payload
4. Compare payload fields for `LimitOfLiability`, `PDLimitOfLiability`, `EarthMovementLimit`, and `FloodLimit` against known property implementation outputs
Expected Results: Payload structure and field values are consistent with the property implementation: same field names, path semantics, and value mapping behavior.

Title: POEDLimit_Sent_To_ODS
Description: Verify POED Limit is sent to ODS using the specified payload tag path
Steps:
1. Login and select required property LOB
2. Enter a valid POED coverage limit value
3. Save and generate payload
4. Inspect payload for `PDLimitOfLiability` under `FormsList/Form/PropertyCoverageLimits/PropertyCoverageLimit`
Expected Results: Payload contains `PDLimitOfLiability` at `FormsList/Form/PropertyCoverageLimits/PropertyCoverageLimit/PDLimitOfLiability` and the value matches the source POED limit.

Title: EQLimit_Sent_Using_EarthMovement_Or_Earthquake
Description: Verify EQ limit is sent using Earth Movement or Earthquake as available
Steps:
1. Login and select required property LOB
2. On Described Causes of Losses, enter `Earth Movement` limit only
3. Save and generate payload
4. Inspect payload for `EarthMovementLimit`
5. Repeat with `Earthquake` limit only
6. Inspect payload for correct path and value
Expected Results: When Earth Movement is provided, payload contains `EarthMovementLimit` under `DescribedCausesOfLosses/DescribedCausesOfLoss/EarthMovementLimit`; when only Earthquake is provided, payload uses the available value and still maps correctly.

Title: FloodLimit_Sent_To_ODS
Description: Verify Flood Limit is sent to ODS using the specified payload tag path
Steps:
1. Login and select the property flow
2. Enter Flood coverage limit on the relevant screens
3. Save and generate payload
4. Inspect payload for `FloodLimit` under `FormsList/Form/DescribedCausesOfLosses/DescribedCausesOfLoss/FloodLimit`
Expected Results: Payload contains `FloodLimit` at the expected path and the numeric value matches the Flood coverage limit entered in the UI.

Title: DoNot_Send_BM_And_WaterDamage_Limits_Negative
Description: Verify Boiler and Water Damage limits are not sent when not required
Steps:
1. Login and select a property LOB under Automated Coding
2. Enter values for Boiler Maintenance and Water Damage limit fields if present
3. Save and generate payload
4. Inspect the outbound payload for any BM or Water Damage limit tags
Expected Results: Payload does not include Boiler Maintenance or Water Damage limit tags. Only EQ, Flood, and POED related limits are included per story requirements.

Title: Coverage_Limits_Demarcated_In_Payload
Description: Verify coverage limits are demarcated correctly in the payload for the listed coverages
Steps:
1. Login and select required property LOB
2. Enter values for POED, EQ/Earthquake, and Flood coverage limits
3. Save and generate payload
4. Inspect payload tag paths for each coverage limit
Expected Results: Payload contains distinct tag paths for each coverage limit and each limit is demarcated correctly according to the story's declaration form paths.

Title: Navigation_EndToEnd_CreateQuote_And_Verify_Payload
Description: Verify full navigation from quote creation through binder/policy while preserving limit mappings
Steps:
1. Login to ez docs application
2. Select required LOB and product
3. Fill all required fields including `Policy Limit`, POED, EQ/Earthquake, and Flood values
4. Create quote and preview document
5. Create binder and policy
6. Inspect payload generated at each stage
Expected Results: Limit values are preserved through create quote, preview document, binder creation, and policy creation. Payload continues to contain the required limit fields and mappings.

Title: Information_Tab_And_DescribedCauses_UI_Fields_Verified
Description: Verify UI screens include the required limit fields and labels for property coverage limits
Steps:
1. Login to ez docs application
2. Navigate to Information tab and Described Causes of Losses tab
3. Confirm display of `Policy Limit`, POED, EQ/Earthquake, and Flood limit fields
4. Confirm label text and field placement are accurate
Expected Results: UI screens display the required limit fields for property coverage. Labels are correct and the fields are visible in the appropriate tabs/form sections.

Title: Payload_Tag_Path_Verification_For_All_Limits
Description: Verify exact payload tag paths for LimitOfLiability
Priority:
1. Login and select required property LOB
2. Enter values for Policy Limit, POED, EQ/Earthquake, and Flood
3. Save and generate payload
4. Inspect the payload for the following paths: LimitOfLiability, PDLimitOfLiability, EarthMovementLimit, FloodLimit
Test Type:
Payload contains:
- `FormsList/Form/LimitOfLiability`
- `FormsList/Form/PropertyCoverageLimits/PropertyCoverageLimit/PDLimitOfLiability`
- `FormsList/Form/DescribedCausesOfLosses/DescribedCausesOfLoss/EarthMovementLimit`
- `FormsList/Form/DescribedCausesOfLosses/DescribedCausesOfLoss/FloodLimit`
All values match the entered coverage limits.
